category_sources: Official JHipster repository describes it as a development platform for modern web applications and microservice architectures.
source_facts.description says JHipster generates, develops, and deploys Spring Boot plus Angular/React applications.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is jhipster; official site and repository use the styled name JHipster.
docs_sources: Official JHipster site documents creating an application and installation.
Official JHipster website provides Getting Started documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official JHipster GitHub repository for the generator is jhipster/generator-jhipster.
tags_sources: Official JHipster repository topics and description cover Java, Spring Boot, Angular, React, Docker, Kubernetes, and generation workflows.
source_facts.description identifies Spring Boot and Angular/React generation.
